# AiM Systems - Ankit Panicker

AiM Systems is a technology consultancy led by Ankit Panicker, a System Architect specializing in Production AI Infrastructure and E2E B2B Product Delivery.

## Core Offerings
- Fixed-price end-to-end AI platform delivery.
- Multi-tenant real-time voice AI platforms.
- WhatsApp automation pipelines and AI receptionists.
- White-label AI infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP.

## Target Market & Availability
- Available for UK/EU Remote engagements.
- Outside IR35 targets.
- B2B product delivery.

## Contact Information
- Name: Ankit Panicker
- Email: mr.ankitpanicker@gmail.com
- Live Demo: https://aimstudio.co.in/app
- Main Website: https://aimsystems.web.app
